landing.heroDescription: Keep your clipboard perfectly synced across every device. Built for fast-moving developers, designers, and creative teams.
landing.sectionTitle: A clipboard that keeps your flow moving
landing.sectionDescription: Manage copying, organizing, and reusing in one place.

sync.title: Instant sync
sync.description: Everything you copy is reflected across your devices in real time.

folder.title: Folder organization
folder.description: Group clips by project and keep your workspace structured.

favorite.title: Favorites
favorite.description: Pin your most-used snippets for quick access.

search.title: Fast search
search.description: Find the clip you need the moment you type a keyword.

login.title: Sign in to EasyClip
login.subtitle: Copy anywhere, paste everywhere
login.configError: API connection settings are missing. Check your environment variables.
login.agreementPrefix: By continuing, you agree to the

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeDescription: Switch between light and dark themes.
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again shortly.
settings.aboutDescription: A modern clipboard manager for designers and developers

trash.title: Trash
trash.description: Review deleted clips and folders, then restore or permanently remove them.
trash.error: Failed to load trash data. Please try again shortly.
trash.emptyDescription: Deleted clips or folders will appear here.
trash.totalCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 items} one {# item} other {# items}}

clearAllModal.title: Empty trash
clearAllModal.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete every item in trash?

trash.clipsCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 clips} one {# clip} other {# clips}}
trash.foldersCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 folders} one {# folder} other {# folders}}

clips.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 clips} one {# clip} other {# clips}}
clips.captureHint: Click anywhere and press Ctrl+V to capture a new clip.

emptyState.title: No saved clips yet
emptyState.description: Copied clips or new pasted items from a folder will appear here.

deleteModal.title: Delete all clips
deleteModal.description: Are you sure you want to delete every clip?
